sections.title: Suggested Workflow
items: Start with Project Info: add the project name, dates, production details, revisions, and logos.
Build the Fixture Patch by importing Excel/CSV or adding fixtures from the library. Use Position Summary to keep colours consistent.
Use Power Calculations after the patch is built. Enter Fix IDs and the fixture type, watts, amps, and label colours will populate from patched data.
Download the project file regularly so the browser state can be reopened and edited later.
Use Distro Labels to add distros, set Label Settings, and check Front RCBO Labels, Rear Labels, and Table View.
Use Export for label PDFs and Fixture Patch Export PDF for the patch sheet.

sections.title: Tips
items: Position colours are the master source for patch colours and linked RCBO label colours.
Supply cards in Power Calculations can be collapsed after setup to keep the page tidy.
Patch Format controls adjust fixture titles and selected table columns without changing fixture data.
PDF export logos appear on the first page only when enabled in Project Info.
Use Report Issue for bugs, missing fixtures, or feature requests.
